Description: Simple Daily Intensity Index (SDII) or average precipitation for days with daily precipitation over 1 mm.
The number of dry periods of 5 day or more, during which the {op} precipitation on a window of 5 day(s) is below 1 mm
The number of heat wave events within a given period. A heat wave occurs when daily minimum and maximum temperatures exceed 22 °C and 30 °C, respectively, over at least 3 days.
The maximum length of heat wave events occurring within a given period. A heat wave occurs when daily minimum and maximum temperatures exceed 22 °C and 30 °C, respectively, over at least 3 days.
The total length of heat wave events occurring within a given period. A heat wave occurs when daily minimum and maximum temperatures exceed 22 °C and 30 °C, respectively, over at least 3 days.
Weighted moving sum of daily precipitation totals with a 7-day window. Weights are an exponential decay of base 0.935.
Cumulative sum of temperature degrees for mean daily temperature above 65 °F (integral_of_air_temperature_excess_wrt_time)
Cumulative sum of temperature degrees for daily temperatures below 65 °F (integral_of_air_temperature_deficit_wrt_time)
Number of days where maximum daily temperatures are above freezing and minimum daily temperatures are at or below freezing
Number of days with daily precipitation flux above the {pr_per_thresh}th percentile of {pr_per_period} (number_of_days_with_lwe_thickness_of_precipitation_amount_above_daily_threshold)
{freq} number of days where temperature is below {tas_per_thresh}th percentile and precipitation is below {pr_per_thresh}th percentile
{freq} number of days where temperature is below {tas_per_thresh}th percentile and precipitation is above {pr_per_thresh}th percentile
